name: Spargel in Weisser Sosse (White Asparagus In
recipeIngredient: 29 ounces white asparagus, cut into spears (2 cans)
4 ounces ham, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the white asparagus spears, reserving half a cup of the liquid.
2. Heat the margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add the flour and whisk until smooth.
4. Gradually pour in the asparagus liquid and milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
5. Continue cooking over low heat, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens and bubbles gently.
6. Add the cooked ham and seasonings (nutmeg and salt) to the sauce.
7. Gently stir in the white asparagus spears into the sauce.
8. Heat through the mixture without boiling.
